name: Sweet and Sour Chicken - Crockpot
recipeInstructions:
1. Place vegetables at the bottom of the crockpot.
2. Sprinkle tapioca over the vegetables.
3. Place chicken on top of the vegetables.
4. In a small bowl, combine all ingredients except rice (pineapple, brown sugar, vinegar, soy sauce, garlic powder, and ginger).
5. Pour the mixture over the chicken.
6. Cover the crockpot and cook on low for 8-10 hours.
7. Before serving, prepare hot cooked rice.
8. Serve the sweet and sour chicken over rice.
9. Leftovers can be reheated in the microwave.
